meaning: n.安慰,舒适,安慰者vt.安慰,使(痛苦等)缓和
examples: It's a comfort talking to you.
I tried to offer a few words of comfort.
The hotel combines comfort with convenience.
And that usually gives one even greater comfort that the initial offering will be boffo.
Book a table for dinner and listen to the live music from the comfort of your seat.
